# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      pre_build_commands:
        description: 'Commands to run before build (one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      build_commands:
        description: 'Main build commands (one per line)'
        required: true
        type: string
      post_build_commands:
        description: 'Commands to run after build (one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory for commands'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: '.'
      shell_type:
        description: 'Shell to use for commands'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - bash
          - sh
        default: 'bash'
      timeout_minutes:
        description: 'Timeout for build process (max 360)'
        required: false
        type: number
        default: 30
      allowed_commands_pattern:
        description: 'Regex pattern for allowed commands (security)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: '^(npm|yarn|pnpm|mvn|gradle|make|cmake|cargo|go|python|pip|dotnet|docker build).*'
      enable_artifact_upload:
        description: 'Upload build artifacts'
        required: false
        type: boolean
        default: false
      artifact_path:
        description: 'Path to artifacts to upload'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: 'build/'
      artifact_name:
        description: 'Name for uploaded artifacts'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: 'build-artifacts'

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  validate-inputs:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 5
    outputs:
      validation_passed: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.passed }}
    steps:
      - name: Validate timeout
        id: validate
        run: |
          TIMEOUT=${{ inputs.timeout_minutes }}
          if [ "$TIMEOUT" -gt 360 ] || [ "$TIMEOUT" -lt 1 ]; then
            echo "Error: Timeout must be between 1 and 360 minutes"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          WORKING_DIR="${{ inputs.working_directory }}"
          if [[ "$WORKING_DIR" == *".."* ]] || [[ "$WORKING_DIR" == "/"* ]]; then
            echo "Error: Invalid working directory path"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          echo "passed=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Validate commands against pattern
        run: |
          PATTERN="${{ inputs.allowed_commands_pattern }}"
          
          validate_commands() {
            local commands="$1"
            local line_num=0
            
            if [ -z "$commands" ]; then
              return 0
            fi
            
            while IFS= read -r line; do
              line_num=$((line_num + 1))
              
              if [ -z "$line" ] || [[ "$line" =~ ^[[:space:]]*# ]]; then
                continue
              fi
              
              if [[ "$line" =~ [\;\&\|] ]]; then
                echo "Error: Command chaining operators (;, &, |) are not allowed for security"
                echo "Line $line_num: $line"
                exit 1
              fi
              
              if [[ "$line" =~ \$\( ]] || [[ "$line" =~ \` ]]; then
                echo "Error: Command substitution is not allowed for security"
                echo "Line $line_num: $line"
                exit 1
              fi
              
              if [[ "$line" =~ (rm[[:space:]]+-rf|sudo|su[[:space:]]|eval|exec|source|wget|curl.*\|) ]]; then
                echo "Error: Potentially dangerous command detected"
                echo "Line $line_num: $line"
                exit 1
              fi
              
              if ! echo "$line" | grep -qE "$PATTERN"; then
                echo "Error: Command does not match allowed pattern"
                echo "Line $line_num: $line"
                echo "Allowed pattern: $PATTERN"
                exit 1
              fi
            done <<< "$commands"
          }
          
          echo "Validating pre-build commands..."
          validate_commands "${{ inputs.pre_build_commands }}"
          
          echo "Validating build commands..."
          validate_commands "${{ inputs.build_commands }}"
          
          echo "Validating post-build commands..."
          validate_commands "${{ inputs.post_build_commands }}"
          
          echo "All commands validated successfully"

  custom-build:
    needs: validate-inputs
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: ${{ fromJSON(inputs.timeout_minutes) }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup environment
        run: |
          echo "Setting up build environment..."
          mkdir -p "${{ inputs.working_directory }}"

      - name: Run pre-build commands
        if: inputs.pre_build_commands != ''
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        run: |
          set -e
          echo "=== Running Pre-Build Commands ==="
          
          COMMANDS=$(cat << 'COMMANDS_EOF'
          ${{ inputs.pre_build_commands }}
          COMMANDS_EOF
          )
          
          while IFS= read -r cmd; do
            if [ -n "$cmd" ] && ! [[ "$cmd" =~ ^[[:space:]]*# ]]; then
              echo "Executing: $cmd"
              eval "$cmd"
            fi
          done <<< "$COMMANDS"

      - name: Run build commands
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        run: |
          set -e
          echo "=== Running Build Commands ==="
          
          COMMANDS=$(cat << 'COMMANDS_EOF'
          ${{ inputs.build_commands }}
          COMMANDS_EOF
          )
          
          while IFS= read -r cmd; do
            if [ -n "$cmd" ] && ! [[ "$cmd" =~ ^[[:space:]]*# ]]; then
              echo "Executing: $cmd"
              eval "$cmd"
            fi
          done <<< "$COMMANDS"

      - name: Run post-build commands
        if: inputs.post_build_commands != ''
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        run: |
          set -e
          echo "=== Running Post-Build Commands ==="
          
          COMMANDS=$(cat << 'COMMANDS_EOF'
          ${{ inputs.post_build_commands }}
          COMMANDS_EOF
          )
          
          while IFS= read -r cmd; do
            if [ -n "$cmd" ] && ! [[ "$cmd" =~ ^[[:space:]]*# ]]; then
              echo "Executing: $cmd"
              eval "$cmd"
            fi
          done <<< "$COMMANDS"

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        if: inputs.enable_artifact_upload == true
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ inputs.artifact_name }}
          path: ${{ inputs.artifact_path }}
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: warn

  build-summary:
    needs: custom-build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Generate build summary
        run: |
          echo "# Custom Build Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "## Configuration" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Working Directory**: \`${{ inputs.working_directory }}\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Shell Type**: \`${{ inputs.shell_type }}\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Timeout**: ${{ inputs.timeout_minutes }} minutes" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Artifacts Enabled**: ${{ inputs.enable_artifact_upload }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "## Build Status" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Result**: ${{ needs.custom-build.result }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
